---
title: Mandatory Assignment 1
author: GFS189, RTL959
date: today
date-format: MMMM DD, YYYY
execute: 
  echo: false
  warning: false
format: 
  pdf: 
    number-sections: true
    colorlinks: true
    geometry:
      - top=20mm
      - left=20mm
      - bottom=20mm
      - right=20mm
    bibliography: references.bib
    cite-method: natbib
    biblio-style: apalike  
    lang: en
    fontsize: 12pt
    highlight-style: github-light
---

{{< include chapters/01_introduction.qmd >}}

{{< include chapters/02_data.qmd >}}

{{< include chapters/03_analysis.qmd >}}

{{< include chapters/04_results.qmd >}}

{{< include chapters/05_conclusion.qmd >}}

## References
::::{#refs}
::::
